section_name: Additional Authority of Type a General-law Municipality
chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets

subsections.text: The governing body of a Type A general-law municipality may:
prevent an encroachment or obstruction on a sidewalk in the municipality;
abate an encroachment or obstruction on a bridge, culvert, sidewalk, or crossway in the municipality;
construct, regulate, or maintain a bridge, culvert, sidewalk, or crossway in the municipality;
regulate the construction of a bridge, culvert, sewer, sidewalk, or crossway in the municipality;
require a person to keep weeds, unclean matter, or trash from the street, sidewalk, or gutter in front of the person’s premises; or
require the owner of land to improve the sidewalk in front of the person’s land.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
